name: Human Body Types
description: One wildcard of 8 equally-weighted human body-type descriptions.

items.name: Body Type
items.description: Eight human body types, equal distribution.

entries.text: slim, slender build with a lean frame, narrow shoulders, and little visible muscle or fat
athletic, toned physique with defined muscles, a flat stomach, and balanced, fit proportions
curvy hourglass figure with a full bust and hips and a clearly defined narrow waist
muscular, powerfully built body with broad shoulders, a thick chest, and well-developed muscles
petite, small-framed build with short stature and delicate, fine-boned proportions
plus-size, full-figured body with soft rounded curves and a fuller, heavier silhouette
lanky build, tall and lean with long limbs, a slight frame, and an elongated silhouette
stocky, stout build with a broad, solid frame, short limbs, and a thick midsection
